channel.title: config on LZB日常
channel.description: Recent content in config on LZB日常

item.title: Hugo使用指南
item.description: 开始 先安装go和git win10 直接去hugo github下载EXE, 配置好环境变量. (Mac: brew install hugo) hugo new site /path/to/site cd /path/to/site hugo new about.md hugo new post/first.md mkdir themes && git clone https://github.com/kakawait/hugo-tranquilpeak-theme.git themes/tranquilpeak, 进入主题目录找到示例的配置文件, 替换config.toml hugo 生成静态文件public hugo server http://localhost:1313查看效果 把public部署到GitHub: 创建仓库yourname.github.io, 然后像git以往的操作, push到该仓库, 最后直接访问https://yourname.github.io 开发测试-快捷操作: ./dev.sh #!/bin/bash hugo hugo server 部署-快捷操作: ./deploy.sh #!/bin/bash # build the project hugo cd public git add . msg="rebuilding site `date`" if [ $# -eq 1 ] then msg="$1" fi git commit -m "$msg" # push source to github git push origin master # come back to blog root cd .
